title: The Sarais' Act, 1867
full_text: The Sarais' Act, 1867 सराय अधिनियम,1867 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 186722 Act Number: 22 Enactment Date: 1867-03-15 Act Year: 1867 Short Title: The Sarais' Act, 1867 Hindi Title: सराय अधिनियम,1867 Long Title: An Act for the regulation of public Saráís and Puraos.. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Sarais' Act, 1867 Show all section Section 1. Repealed. Section 2. Interpretation clause. Section 3. Notice of this Act to be given to keepers of Sarai's. Section 4. Registers of Sara'i's to be kept Section 5. Lodgers, &c., not to be received in Sara'i's until registered. Section 6. Magistrate may refuse to refuse to register keeper not producing certificate of character. Section 7. Duties of keepers of Sara'i's. Section 8. Power to order reports from keepers of Sara'i's Section 9. Power to shut up, secure, clear, and clean deserted Sara'i'. Section 10. Taking down or repairing ruinous Sara'i's. Section 11. Sale of materials of ruinous Sara'i's. Section 12. Penalty for permitting Sara'i's to be filthy or overgrown. Proviso Section 13. Power for Local Government to make regulations. Section 14. Penalty for infringing Act or regulations. Section 15. Conviction for third offence to disqualify persons from keeping Sara'i's Section 16. Nothing in Act to apply to certain Sarai. Section 17. Extent of Act. Section 18. Short title.
